tasks.task: OpenAPI 3.x parser — spec URL/file → entity graph with field types, required flags, enums. Plan: tasks/active/dsc-1-openapi-parser-2026-03-15.md
Entity dependency graph — foreign key detection (xId naming), topological sort, cycle detection. Plan: tasks/active/dsc-2-entity-dependency-graph-2026-03-15.md
UI form discovery — sitecap aria tree → entity graph with label-based type heuristics
Field-type-aware data generators — faker mapping for string/email/phone/currency/date/number/boolean/enum/reference
Entity templates — resolve references (customerId → ID from seeded customer), handle nested entities
Seed plan YAML — generate/read/write seed plans, editable counts and custom values
API seeding — HTTP POST to REST endpoints with auth, ID tracking across entities, error handling
CLI — discover, plan, run commands with --openapi, --auth, --count, --dry-run options
UI seeding — generate sitetest YAML steps or execute directly via sitetest library API
tRPC support — read tools.json / operations registry → entity graph
GraphQL support — introspection query → entity graph
Smart seeding — edge cases, personas (solo operator vs full company), report-friendly data
Library API — export discover(), seed() for sitefix programmatic consumption
